query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total_test FROM crm_leads WHERE name LIKE '%Teste%' OR name LIKE '%teste%' OR name LIKE '%Test%'; SELECT COUNT(*) as total_all FROM crm_leads; SELECT COUNT(*) as total_real FROM crm_leads WHERE name NOT LIKE '%Teste%' AND name NOT LIKE '%teste%' AND name NOT LIKE '%Test%'
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 72z9zwCQQTtJjjC.7f634d589b23 --database NKs9YYU4Bt79zUwnWH56wx --execute SELECT COUNT(*) as total_test FROM crm_leads WHERE name LIKE '%Teste%' OR name LIKE '%teste%' OR name LIKE '%Test%'; SELECT COUNT(*) as total_all FROM crm_leads; SELECT COUNT(*) as total_real FROM crm_leads WHERE name NOT LIKE '%Teste%' AND name NOT LIKE '%teste%' AND name NOT LIKE '%Test%'
